method: Generated single source of truth. Website pages display this JSON and do not calculate separate bullpen scores in the browser.
note: v3 runs-aware formula. Reliever counts are context only and do not add hidden score points.
formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

teams.label: Fresh
teams.workload_read: Low recent workload. No major bullpen fatigue flag from the last three days.
teams.score_reason: Fresh (0.0/10). No completed games in the last three days — the pen comes in rested.
teams.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

Seattle Mariners.score_reason: Fresh (0.0/10). No completed games in the last three days — the pen comes in rested.
Seattle Mariners.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
